title: Bedrock Buttons
description: Minimalistic GUI and HUD in Bedrock Edition style
body:
![BBLabel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2437d0b05a3474fef868f886035ddc41bd1e08e_0.webp)
# About
This resource pack reworks the GUI, and makes it in the style of Bedrock Edition.
The HUD has also been redesigned, focusing on the simplified style of the Bedrock Edition interface. The resource pack makes the game feel fresh and minimalistic.

![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6b7c397b50aaba4d72882309168aa9b17c4f642_0.webp)

![GUI Buttons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f87183d532aeddd67290d91a27e1ab7c4b3e46a.png)

### Supported Mods:
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)
- [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
